allow: Bash(python -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile\('F446RE_TRACKING_Report.docx'\); print\('Entries:', len\(z.namelist\(\)\)\); print\('Has document.xml:', 'word/document.xml' in z.namelist\(\)\); print\('Size of document.xml:', z.getinfo\('word/document.xml'\).file_size\)")

Bash(python -c "import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; z=zipfile.ZipFile\('F446RE_TRACKING_Report.docx'\); ET.fromstring\(z.read\('word/document.xml'\)\); print\('XML OK, size:', z.getinfo\('word/document.xml'\).file_size\)")
